title: Kingiodendron pinnatum
taxonomy: Kingiodendron pinnatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is a member of the genus Kingiodendron. The classification of Kingiodendron pinnatum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Sapindales, family Sapindaceae, genus Kingiodendron, species K. pinnatum. This classification reflects its relationships to other plants within the Sapindaceae family. The exact classification of Kingiodendron pinnatum may vary depending on the source.
